question: You have loaded a hazardous material into a cargo tank. What must you do before you move the vehicle?
canonical_answer:
a. Close all manholes and valves. Be sure they are free of leaks.
b. Call Chemtrec by phone and tell them where you are going.
c. Have the loading observers sign the shipping papers.
d. Get started on your trip, everything is ok

A

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: Close all manholes and valves. Be sure they are free of leaks
